Project.Author: alessandramancas
Project.Description:
<html> <head> <style type="text/css"> <!-- body { color: #000000; font-family: Dialog; font-size: 12px } --> </style>
</head> <body> </body> </html>
Project.Name: book

CompositeValueSpecification.Value: 404, "The Page You are Searching For is Not available"
406, "Unable to Connect to DB, Please Check your db credentials in application.properties"
405, "Requested HTTP method is not supported by this URL"

Attribute.InitialValue: "UPDATE " + BooksDBConstants.TABLE_BOOK + " SET " + BooksDBConstants.COLUMN_NAME + "=? , " + BooksDBConstants.COLUMN_AUTHOR + "=?, " + BooksDBConstants.COLUMN_PRICE + "=?, " + BooksDBConstants.COLUMN_QUANTITY + "=? " + " WHERE " + BooksDBConstants.COLUMN_BARCODE + "=?"
Attribute.Name: updateBookByIdQuery

Attribute.InitialValue: "SELECT * FROM " + UsersDBConstants.TABLE_USERS + " WHERE " + UsersDBConstants.COLUMN_USERNAME + "=? AND " + UsersDBConstants.COLUMN_PASSWORD + "=? AND " + UsersDBConstants.COLUMN_USERTYPE + "=?"
Attribute.Name: loginUserQuery

Operation.Name: isLoggedIn

Operation.Name: setActiveTab

Operation.Name: updateCartItems
